prompt: Open the Maps app and plan a driving route with at least two stops, going from 'Apple Park, Cupertino' to 'Stanford University, Stanford CA' to 'Half Moon Bay, CA'. Once Maps shows the multi-leg route, write the three location names (one per line) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/360-route.txt to confirm. Fast path: cerebellum 'maps multi_stop_route "Apple Park, Cupertino" "Stanford University, Stanford CA" "Half Moon Bay, CA"' then write the three names to the confirm file.
